branch.branch_summary: After v9.5.0, advance v9.6 provider execution cost/quota boundary, v9.7 third-party operator validation, v9.8 production execution go/no-go evidence candidate, and v9.9 external runtime production readiness review.

tree_answer.where_are_we: The runtime is between v9.5 and the next concrete branch.
tree_answer.why_this_branch: Ship v9.5 External Runtime Incident Drill and Recovery Evidence: bind provider incident detection, containment, rollback, recovery, operator notification, learning update, and resume/stop governance before external provider execution advances.
tree_answer.what_branch_comes_next: Open an implementation task for the current frontier: After v9.5.0, advance v9.6 provider execution cost/quota boundary, v9.7 third-party operator validation, v9.8 production execution go/no-go evidence candidate, and v9.9 external runtime production readiness review.
